title: plectranthus purpuratus subsp. purpuratus
intro: Plectranthus purpuratus subsp. purpuratus, also known as purple spurflower, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its purple flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities, which make it useful for wound healing and treating various skin conditions. The health benefits of Plectranthus purpuratus subsp. purpuratus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
